top.title: Trump arrives in China for high-stakes meeting with Xi Jinping
top.summary: The leaders of the global superpowers are expected to discuss the war in Iran, tariffs, AI and Taiwan during the two-day visit.

top.title: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial
top.summary: The court has ordered a new trial over the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.

top.title: Woman isolating on British island in South Pacific after hantavirus contact
top.summary: The woman who was on a virus-hit ship shows "no signs of illness", the government of Pitcairn Islands, a British Overseas Territory, says.

top.title: Thousands of Waymos recalled after robotaxi swept into a creek
top.summary: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.

top.title: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
top.summary: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.

top.title: Suicide forum fined £950,000 for not blocking UK users
top.summary: The regulator said the forum had not done enough to protect UK users - but critics accuse Ofcom of acting too slowly.

title.#text: Garmin’s mini satellite communicators are on sale for up to 40 percent off
Audemars Piguet and Swatch made a $400 ‘pop’ pocket watch
